prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；东北大学（主校）软科主榜约第 38 名（2026 年），近年排名稳定在 36–39 名区间，层次稳固；2026 年声誉评价中性/混合，东北大学（主校）因校区争议受关注但非负面；抖音热度排名第 82、评价一般，未见明显投档断档记录；整体报考关注度平稳；依托东北大学 A+ 控制科学与工程、A 计算机科学与技术、A- 机械工程、A- 材料科学与工程、A- 软件工程等，与招生专业（自动化类、计算机类、机械类等）高度关联，对工科考生吸引力较强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等核 心专业持续高热推荐；本省 2026 年考生总数约 53.5 万，按近年物理类占比约 61.5% 估算约 32.9 万人，较 2025 年物理类 28.5 万人增加约 15.5%，竞争明显加剧；学校位于河北秦皇岛，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅后移、2026 年计划仅微幅扩招、本省物理类考生显著增加及核心工科专业持续高热，预计 2026 年竞争进一步加剧，位次继续后移；预测最低位次约 16368 名，区间 15868–16868 名。

学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Northeastern University (main campus) ranks approximately 38th on the Soft Science main list (2026), with stable rankings in the 36–39 range in recent years, solid level; 2026 reputation evaluation neutral/mixed, Northeastern University (main campus) attracts attention due to campus disputes but not negative; Douyin popularity ranking 82nd, average evaluation, no obvious enrollment gaps; overall application attention stable; relies on Northeastern University's A+ Control Science and Engineering, A Computer Science and Technology, A- Mechanical Engineering, A- Materials Science and Engineering, A- Software Engineering, etc., highly relevant to enrollment majors (Automation, Computer, Mechanical, etc.), strongly attractive to engineering candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation remain highly popular; total number of candidates in the province for 2026 approximately 535,000, estimated at about 329,000 based on the recent physics category proportion of about 61.5%, an increase of about 15.5% compared to 2025's 285,000 physics candidates, significantly intensifying competition; the school is located in Qinhuangdao, Hebei, not a local university, with no local enrollment preference.

预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, only a slight expansion in 2026 enrollment plan, a notable increase in provincial physics candidates, and sustained high popularity of core engineering majors, competition is expected to further intensify in 2026, with rankings continuing to shift backward; predicted minimum ranking approximately 16368, range 15868–16868.
